Title: Manage Copilot coding agent repository access via the API
Author: Allison
EnhancedContent:
Organization owners who want to manage [Copilot coding agent](https://docs.github.com/copilot/concepts/agents/coding-agent/about-coding-agent) access at scale can now do so programmatically with the new [Copilot coding agent management REST APIs](https://docs.github.com/rest/copilot/copilot-coding-agent-management?apiVersion=2026-03-10), available in public preview.

With these APIs, you can:

- Decide whether Copilot coding agent is available for no repositories, all repositories, or selected repositories owned by your organization.
- Add or remove allowed repositories when your organization is set to allow **Only selected repositories**.

You can also manage these settings through the UI by navigating to your organization’s settings and clicking **Copilot** then **Coding agent**.

To learn more, see [“Managing access to GitHub Copilot coding agent”](https://docs.github.com/enterprise-cloud@latest/copilot/concepts/agents/coding-agent/access-management) in the GitHub Docs.
